message:
feat(dispatch,batching): support multi-output primitives in vmap batching and add output axes validation

- Add apply_batch_rule_multi and batch_passthrough_leading_multi to
  handle multi-output primitives (QR, SVD, Eigh) in the batching engine,
  slicing batched inputs per-element and stacking per-output results
- Wire batch_eval_jaxpr_with_consts to use apply_batch_rule_multi with
  output arity validation, fixing the previous single-output assumption
- Add VmapAxesCountMismatch error variant and validation in
  execute_vmap_loop_and_stack
- Add test_batch_eval_jaxpr_qr_binds_all_unbatched_outputs and
  test_batch_eval_jaxpr_qr_binds_all_batched_outputs tests
- Use std::f64::consts::PI in scalar construction test (Clippy approx_constant)
- Add partial eval edge-case tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
